analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with existing black hole-themed UI elements. The docs/index.html has a basic structure but lacks comprehensive black hole visuals and animations. The docs/styles.css needs enhancement to create a cohesive cosmic theme with animated black hole effects. The docs/script.js should include functionality for animated slides and interactive elements related to black holes.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with a cosmic theme including dark backgrounds, glowing elements, and animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and interactive planet movements.
Add sections for interactive black hole information, animated slides, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.
Implement JavaScript functions for animated slides, interactive black hole visuals, and mobile menu toggle functionality with smooth transitions.
